title: AI dispatcher listens to clear speech
changes: When AI dispatch is turned on for a channel, the system records normal clear voice (not the digital vocoder).
Speech-to-text and the AI dispatcher understand radio traffic much better on those channels.
Android radios and the web console switch automatically when AI dispatch is enabled.

title: Ask where a unit is (10-20)
changes: Command staff can ask for a unit's location on the radio; the AI answers using the live map.
Replies use simple landmarks or cross streets first (for example near Main Street and 1st Street).
Officers can ask for the full street address when they need it.

title: 10-8 property and plate improvements
changes: Property dispatches send the property number and name in location notes (no dashes in the number).
Places not in the property list are looked up on the map before creating a call.
Plate and VIN lookups are sent to the call in 10-8 and also posted as a comment as a backup.

title: 10-8 call types and safer comments
changes: Self-dispatch sends the exact call type your CAD expects, with priority 1 through 4 (never 0).
Addresses are formatted for Google Maps and 10-8 geocoding.
Radio comments on open calls use the officer's callsign and what they said; the system never comments on calls that do not exist.

title: Command console layout
changes: Channel tiles sit in a strip on the left; drag a channel into the workspace for a large panel.
Workspace shows a 2 by 2 grid on normal screens and 3 by 3 on wide screens.
Channel names appear on a clear title bar so controls are not crowded.

title: Dispatcher voice (TTS) improvements
changes: Dispatcher voice defaults to Eleven v3 for more natural speech.
10-codes like 10-97 are spoken correctly (not as ten to ninety-seven).
Dashes in codes use short pauses instead of the word to.

title: Android app update reminders
changes: Radios check for updates more often while the app is open.
A clear on-screen message appears when an update is downloaded and the radio needs a reboot to install.

title: 10-8 self-dispatch from the radio
changes: When an officer self-dispatches, the server can create a new call in 10-8 automatically.
The system matches the right open call for status updates and comments by unit and location.

title: Radio audio quality on Android
changes: Reduced extra processing on received audio so voices sound clearer on handsets.

title: AI dispatch and integrations
changes: AI dispatcher can answer questions about addresses, pending calls, plates, and more.
Per-agency settings for 10-8, plate lookup, and ElevenLabs voice under Admin.
AI activity log shows transcripts, intents, and what the dispatcher did.

title: Live map and GPS
changes: Dispatch map shows unit locations and refreshes automatically.
GPS history lets you replay where a unit drove over a time range.

title: Command console basics
changes: Monitor multiple radio channels from the web console.
Transmission log with search and playback.
10-33 emergency marker and tone-out support.

title: Initial release
changes: Push-to-talk on Android radios and in the browser.
Private channels per agency with half-duplex voice.
Sign-in and admin tools for users and channels.
